SQLLite.SQL: SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "Name" , CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "CasePartyNumber" , CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "PartyRoleCode" , CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE || '_' || CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "PartyKey" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , WARRANTS W , PARTIES P WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND ( ( W.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND W.DEF1_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND W.DEF1_CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO ) OR ( W.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND W.DEF2_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND W.DEF2_CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO ) ) GROUP BY P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME , CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO , CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE
